description: This file defines the 'CalculatorActivity' class for an Android calculator app. It handles user interactions, calculator logic, display rendering, and arithmetic operations within the activity lifecycle.

classes.name: CalculatorActivity
classes.description: An Android activity implementing a simple calculator interface with basic arithmetic operations and display handling.

methods.name: onCreate
methods.description: Initializes the activity, binds UI components, and sets up event listeners.

methods.name: bindAppend
methods.description: Binds a button to append a digit or decimal point to the current input.

methods.name: bindOp
methods.description: Binds an operator button to perform the corresponding operation.

methods.name: onAppend
methods.description: Handles appending a digit or decimal point to the current input, respecting input rules.

methods.name: onOperation
methods.description: Processes operator button presses, preparing for calculations or chaining operations.

methods.name: onEquals
methods.description: Performs the pending calculation and updates the display with the result.

methods.name: onClear
methods.description: Resets all calculator state to initial.

methods.name: applyOp
methods.description: Applies a basic arithmetic operation to two operands, handling division by zero.

methods.name: render
methods.description: Updates the calculator display based on current state.

methods.name: renderError
methods.description: Displays an error message and resets state.

methods.name: format
methods.description: Formats a double value for display, removing unnecessary decimal parts.
